ddls:
CREATE TABLE "restaurants" (
  "restaurant_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each restaurant */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the restaurant */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the restaurant */,
  "url" TEXT /* URL of the restaurant's page on the platform */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the restaurant's location */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the restaurant's location */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the restaurant */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email of the restaurant */,
  "hours_of_operation" TEXT /* Hours of operation for the restaurant */,
  "rating" REAL /* Average rating of the restaurant */,
  "price_range" TEXT /* Price range of the restaurant */,
  "cuisine" TEXT /* Cuisine type of the restaurant */,
  "image_url" TEXT /* URL of the restaurant's image */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("restaurant_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username chosen by the user */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email of the user */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password of the user */,
  "joined_date" TEXT /* Date the user joined the platform */,
  "profile_picture_url" TEXT /* URL of the user's profile picture */,
  "bio" TEXT /* Biography of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reviews" (
  "review_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each review */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who wrote the review */,
  "restaurant_id" INTEGER /* ID of the restaurant being reviewed */,
  "rating" REAL /* Rating given by the user (out of 5) */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date the review was written */,
  "review" TEXT /* Text of the review */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the review */,
  "useful_votes" INTEGER /* Number of useful votes for the review */,
  "funny_votes" INTEGER /* Number of funny votes for the review */,
  "cool_votes" INTEGER /* Number of cool votes for the review */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("review_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reviews_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reviews_restaurant_id FOREIGN KEY ("restaurant_id") REFERENCES restaurants ("restaurant_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "ratings" (
  "rating_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each rating */,
  "review_id" INTEGER /* ID of the review associated with the rating */,
  "food_quality" REAL /* Food quality rating (out of 5) */,
  "service_quality" REAL /* Service quality rating (out of 5) */,
  "ambiance" REAL /* Ambiance rating (out of 5) */,
  "overall_experience" REAL /* Overall experience rating (out of 5) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("rating_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_ratings_review_id FOREIGN KEY ("review_id") REFERENCES reviews ("review_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "menu_items" (
  "menu_item_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each menu item */,
  "restaurant_id" INTEGER /* ID of the restaurant offering the menu item */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the menu item */,
  "price" REAL /* Price of the menu item */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the menu item */,
  "category" TEXT /* Category of the menu item */,
  "image_url" TEXT /* URL of the menu item's image */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("menu_item_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_menu_items_restaurant_id FOREIGN KEY ("restaurant_id") REFERENCES restaurants ("restaurant_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "restaurant_services" (
  "service_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each service */,
  "restaurant_id" INTEGER /* ID of the restaurant offering the service */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the service */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the service */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("service_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_restaurant_services_restaurant_id FOREIGN KEY ("restaurant_id") REFERENCES restaurants ("restaurant_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "recommendations" (
  "recommendation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each recommendation */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user being recommended to */,
  "restaurant_id" INTEGER /* ID of the restaurant being recommended */,
  "reason" TEXT /* Reason for the recommendation */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("recommendation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_recommendations_restaurant_id FOREIGN KEY ("restaurant_id") REFERENCES restaurants ("restaurant_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_recommendations_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_preferences" (
  "preference_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each preference */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user with the preference */,
  "cuisine" TEXT /* Cuisine preferred by the user */,
  "price_range" TEXT /* Price range preferred by the user */,
  "dining_style" TEXT /* Dining style preferred by the user */,
  "meal_type" TEXT /* Meal type preferred by the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("preference_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_preferences_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reviewsLikes" (
  "like_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each like */,
  "review_id" INTEGER /* ID of the review being liked */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user giving the like */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("like_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reviewsLikes_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reviewsLikes_review_id FOREIGN KEY ("review_id") REFERENCES reviews ("review_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reviewsDislikes" (
  "dislike_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each dislike */,
  "review_id" INTEGER /* ID of the review being disliked */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user giving the dislike */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("dislike_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reviewsDislikes_review_id FOREIGN KEY ("review_id") REFERENCES reviews ("review_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reviewsDislikes_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reviewsReports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "review_id" INTEGER /* ID of the review being reported */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user giving the report */,
  "reason" TEXT /* Reason for the report */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reviewsReports_review_id FOREIGN KEY ("review_id") REFERENCES reviews ("review_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reviewsReports_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "restaurant_responses" (
  "response_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each response */,
  "review_id" INTEGER /* ID of the review being responded to */,
  "restaurant_id" INTEGER /* ID of the restaurant responding */,
  "response" TEXT /* Text of the response */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("response_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_restaurant_responses_restaurant_id FOREIGN KEY ("restaurant_id") REFERENCES restaurants ("restaurant_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_restaurant_responses_review_id FOREIGN KEY ("review_id") REFERENCES reviews ("review_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "follower_following" (
  "follow_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each follow relationship */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user following */,
  "followed_user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user being followed */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("follow_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_follower_following_followed_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("followed_user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_follower_following_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "friendship" (
  "friendship_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each friendship relationship */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "friend_user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the friend */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("friendship_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_friendship_friend_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("friend_user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_friendship_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "social_media" (
  "social_media_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each social media account */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "platform" TEXT /* Social media platform */,
  "handle" TEXT /* Handle of the user on the platform */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("social_media_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_social_media_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "order_history" (
  "order_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each order */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the order */,
  "restaurant_id" INTEGER /* ID of the restaurant being ordered from */,
  "order_date" TEXT /* Date the order was made */,
  "total_cost" REAL /* Total cost of the order */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the order */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("order_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_order_history_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_order_history_restaurant_id FOREIGN KEY ("restaurant_id") REFERENCES restaurants ("restaurant_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "payment_methods" (
  "payment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each payment method */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who owns the payment method */,
  "payment_method" TEXT /* Type of payment method */,
  "card_number" TEXT /* Card number of the payment method */,
  "expiration_date" TEXT /* Expiration date of the payment method */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("payment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_payment_methods_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
